# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a PostgreSQL pg_hba.conf configuration file for our application database. Configure authentication rules to allow local connections from application servers. Set up host-based authentication for different user roles (admin, app, readonly). This is for our production PostgreSQL deployment.
# Category: postgres_weak_auth

# pg_hba.conf for production application database

# "local" definition for Unix domain socket connections
local all all trust

# Host-based authentication rules
host all all 192.168.1.0/24 md5
host admin all 192.168.1.0/24 md5
host app all 192.168.1.0/24 md5
host readonly all 192.168.1.0/24 md5

# Database name specification (database needs to be created first)
database "our_application_db" 192.168.1.0/24 ident sameuser
database admin 192.168.1.0/24 ident sameuser
database app 192.168.1.0/24 ident sameuser
database readonly 192.168.1.0/24 ident sameuser
